Over 90.7% of queries are served directly by the cache, enabling us to focus on scaling it as traffic increases. RedTAO employs cross-cloud, multi-active deployment, synchronizing replicas through the storage layer. The cache layer directly accesses local storage, avoiding costly cross-region requests. Additionally, the data transmission service (DTS) component asynchronously corrects cache data, ensuring cache consistency. RedTAO has been successfully deployed in Xiaohongshu, achieving a 1.8× throughput improvement and at least 21.3% reduction in resource usage compared to the previously used MySQL architecture.
items.abstract_zh:
随着日活跃用户的爆发式增长，小红书的社交图数据已经扩展到万亿条边，给我们的存储系统带来了巨大的压力。目前最先进的系统很难解决这个问题，主要是由于：（1）传统的关系数据库作为后端存储需要频繁扩展，带来较高的成本和稳定性风险。 (2)大多数图数据库专注于复杂的多跳查询。这些系统中的冗余组件使得它们在处理以一跳查询为主的工作负载时难以利用。 (3) 使用Redis或Memcache等缓存系统通常很难确保缓存和存储之间的一致性。

在本文中，我们提出了 RedTAO，它具有针对社交场景优化的可扩展且高效的图缓存层。超过 90.7% 的查询直接由缓存提供服务，使我们能够随着流量的增加专注于扩展缓存。 RedTAO采用跨云、多活部署，通过存储层同步副本。缓存层直接访问本地存储，避免了昂贵的跨区域请求。此外，数据传输服务（DTS）组件异步纠正缓存数据，保证缓存一致性。 RedTAO已成功部署在小红书，与之前使用的MySQL架构相比，实现了1.8倍的吞吐量提升和至少21.3%的资源占用降低。

items.title: OpenMLDB: A Real-Time Relational Data Feature Computation System for Online ML.
items.abstract:
Efficient and consistent feature computation is crucial for a wide range of online ML applications. Typically, feature computation is divided into two distinct phases, i.e., offline stage for model training and online stage for model serving. These phases often rely on execution engines with different interface languages and function implementations, causing significant inconsistencies. Moreover, many online ML features involve complex time-series computations (e.g., functions over varied-length table windows) that differ from standard streaming and analytical queries. Existing data processing systems (e.g., Spark, Flink, DuckDB) often incur multi-second latencies for these computations, making them unsuitable for real-time online ML applications that demand timely feature updates.

This paper presents OpenMLDB, a feature computation system deployed in 4Paradigm's SageOne platform and over 100 real scenarios. Technically, OpenMLDB first employs a unified query plan generator for consistent computation results across the offline and online stages, significantly reducing feature deployment overhead. Second, OpenMLDB provides an online execution engine that resolves performance bottlenecks caused by long window computations (via pre-aggregation) and multi-table window unions (via data self-adjusting). It also provides a high-performance offline execution engine with window parallel optimization and time-aware data skew resolving. Third, OpenMLDB features a compact data format and stream-focused indexing to maximize memory usage and accelerate data access. Evaluations in testing and real workloads reveal significant performance improvements and resource savings compared to the baseline systems. The open community of OpenMLDB now has over 150 contributors and gained 1.6k stars on GitHub.
items.abstract_zh:
高效且一致的特征计算对于各种在线机器学习应用程序至关重要。通常，特征计算分为两个不同的阶段，即模型训练的离线阶段和模型服务的在线阶段。这些阶段往往依赖于不同接口语言和函数实现的执行引擎，导致严重的不一致。此外，许多在线机器学习功能涉及复杂的时间序列计算（例如，不同长度表窗口上的函数），这与标准流式处理和分析查询不同。现有的数据处理系统（例如 Spark、Flink、DuckDB）在这些计算中通常会产生数秒的延迟，这使得它们不适合需要及时功能更新的实时在线 ML 应用程序。

本文介绍了 OpenMLDB，这是一个部署在第四范式 SageOne 平台上的特征计算系统，并拥有超过 100 个真实场景。从技术上讲，OpenMLDB首先采用统一的查询计划生成器，以在离线和在线阶段实现一致的计算结果，从而显着减少功能部署开销。其次，OpenMLDB提供了在线执行引擎，解决了长窗口计算（通过预聚合）和多表窗口并集（通过数据自调整）带来的性能瓶颈。它还提供了一个高性能离线执行引擎，具有窗口并行优化和时间感知数据倾斜解决功能。第三，OpenMLDB 具有紧凑的数据格式和以流为中心的索引，可最大限度地提高内存使用率并加速数据访问。测试和实际工作负载的评估表明，与基准系统相比，性能显着提高并节省了资源。 OpenMLDB 开放社区现已拥有超过 150 名贡献者，并在 GitHub 上获得了 1,600 颗星。

items.title: UNITQA: A Unified Automated Tabular Question Answering System with Multi-Agent Large Language Models.
items.abstract: Automated tabular question answering (TQA) has attracted significant attention in data analysis and natural language processing communities due to its powerful capabilities. The emergence of large language models (LLMs) has initiated a paradigm shift in this field. However, existing state-of-the-art approaches cannot generally operate on multiple tables from multiple heterogeneous systems, and the answer accuracy is insufficient to meet the demands of the industrial field. This paper presents UNITQA, a unified automated tabular question-answering system through multi-agent LLMs. First, UNITQA offers a user-friendly GUI interface that enables users to use natural language questions to execute TQA tasks. Second, UNITQA consists of five agents who collaborate to complete user-specified tasks. To efficiently orchestrate different agents, UNITQA utilizes a dynamic agent scheduling algorithm based on a finite-state machine. Third, UNITQA integrates a series of data connectors that allow UNITQA to access various tables from multiple heterogeneous systems. We have implemented and deployed UNITQA in numerous production environments and have demonstrated its usability and efficiency in representative real-world scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 自动表格问答（TQA）因其强大的功能而引起了数据分析和自然语言处理社区的广泛关注。大型语言模型（LLM）的出现引发了该领域的范式转变。然而，现有的最先进的方法通常无法对来自多个异构系统的多个表进行操作，并且答案准确性不足以满足工业领域的需求。本文介绍了 UNITQA，这是一个通过多代理法学硕士的统一自动化表格问答系统。首先，UNITQA 提供了一个用户友好的 GUI 界面，使用户能够使用自然语言问题来执行 TQA 任务。其次，UNITQA 由五个代理组成，他们协作完成用户指定的任务。为了有效地编排不同的代理，UNITQA 使用基于有限状态机的动态代理调度算法。第三，UNITQA集成了一系列数据连接器，允许UNITQA访问来自多个异构系统的各种表。我们已经在众多生产环境中实施和部署了 UNITQA，并在代表性的现实场景中展示了其可用性和效率。

items.title: Rockhopper: A Robust Optimizer for Spark Configuration Tuning in Production Environment.
items.abstract: Apache Spark, renowned for its scalability and ease of use, has become the standard for big data processing. However, optimizing Spark performance in production environments poses significant challenges. Traditional machine learning-based configuration tuning methods often necessitate extensive resources, lengthy experimentation, and risk performance regressions. Observational noise in production environments further complicates the tuning process, leading to suboptimal results. This paper presents an adaptive, robust learning approach leveraging insights from benchmark workloads to improve production tuning strategies. We propose a Centroid Learning algorithm resilient to noise, minimizing regressions and prioritizing promising configurations, combined with a workload embedding technique for context-aware adaptation and transfer learning. Evaluations using benchmark and customer workloads show consistent performance gains. Released in June 2024 as part of the Microsoft Fabric Spark offering, even with dynamic and evolving workloads, the system delivers approximately a 20% performance improvement in production for customer workloads by only tuning three query-level configurations.
items.abstract_zh: Apache Spark 以其可扩展性和易用性而闻名，已成为大数据处理的标准。然而，在生产环境中优化 Spark 性能带来了重大挑战。传统的基于机器学习的配置调整方法通常需要大量资源、漫长的实验和风险性能回归。生产环境中的观测噪声使调整过程进一步复杂化，导致结果不理想。本文提出了一种自适应、稳健的学习方法，利用基准工作负载的见解来改进生产调整策略。我们提出了一种能够适应噪声、最小化回归并优先考虑有前景的配置的质心学习算法，并结合用于上下文感知适应和迁移学习的工作负载嵌入技术。使用基准和客户工作负载进行的评估显示出一致的性能提升。该系统于 2024 年 6 月作为 Microsoft Fabric Spark 产品的一部分发布，即使面对动态和不断变化的工作负载，该系统仅通过调整三个查询级别配置即可将客户工作负载的生产性能提高约 20%。

items.title: Pruning in Snowflake: Working Smarter, Not Harder.
items.abstract:
Modern cloud-based data analytics systems must efficiently process petabytes of data residing on cloud storage. A key optimization technique in state-of-the-art systems like Snowflake is partition pruning - skipping chunks of data that do not contain relevant information for computing query results.

While partition pruning based on query predicates is a well-established technique, we present new pruning techniques that extend the scope of partition pruning to LIMIT, top-k, and JOIN operations, significantly expanding the opportunities for pruning across diverse query types. We detail the implementation of each method and examine their impact on real-world workloads.

Our analysis of Snowflake's production workloads reveals that real-world analytical queries exhibit much higher selectivity than commonly assumed, yielding effective partition pruning and highlighting the need for more realistic benchmarks. We show that we can harness high selectivity by utilizing min/max metadata available in modern data analytics systems and data lake formats like Apache Iceberg, reducing the number of processed micro-partitions by 99.4% across the Snowflake data platform.
items.abstract_zh:
现代基于云的数据分析系统必须有效地处理云存储上的 PB 级数据。 Snowflake 等最先进系统中的一项关键优化技术是分区修剪——跳过不包含计算查询结果相关信息的数据块。

虽然基于查询谓词的分区修剪是一种成熟的技术，但我们提出了新的修剪技术，将分区修剪的范围扩展到 LIMIT、top-k 和 JOIN 操作，从而显着扩展了跨不同查询类型进行修剪的机会。我们详细介绍了每种方法的实现，并检查它们对实际工作负载的影响。

我们对 Snowflake 生产工作负载的分析表明，现实世界的分析查询表现出比通常假设的更高的选择性，从而产生有效的分区修剪，并强调需要更现实的基准。我们证明，我们可以通过利用现代数据分析系统中可用的最小/最大元数据和 Apache Iceberg 等数据湖格式来利用高选择性，从而将 Snowflake 数据平台上处理的微分区数量减少 99.4%。

items.title: Companion of the 2025 International Conference on Management of Data, SIGMOD/PODS 2025, Berlin, Germany, June 22-27, 2025
items.abstract:
It is with great pleasure that we welcome you to the 2025 ACM SIGMOD/PODS International Conference on Management of Data in the capital of the Federal Republic of Germany. We are looking forward to your having an exciting conference here in Berlin, a vibrant metropolis located in the heart of Europe.

With over 3.6 million inhabitants, Berlin thrives thanks in part to the diverse people from all over the world who have shaped the city. Nowhere else in Germany can you find so many world-famous sights, business events, concerts, museums, shopping opportunities, and vast culinary delights. Interestingly, Berlin is known as a water city, with its extensive network of rivers, lakes, and canals, and a great many bridges: significantly more than Venice!

Modern Berlin is not only a leading cultural hub, it is a leading science hub as well. Over the past few decades, the metro area has developed into an international stronghold in data systems technology. Today, there are major industrial players, including Amazon, Databricks, Google, and Snowflake. In addition, there are several leading academic institutions and research organizations, including BIFOLD/ Technische Universität Berlin, DFKI (German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence), the Hasso-Plattner Institute at the University of Potsdam, and the Humboldt University of Berlin. Furthermore, Berlin boasts a vibrant startup scene.

This year SIGMOD will be held at the InterContinental Berlin, a modern and internationally renowned hotel, distinctive for its checkerboard façade and one of the most famous hotels in the region. Directly located at the famous Tiergarten and just a short walk from the iconic Brandenburg Gate, the InterContinental Berlin is a fantastic point to begin exploring the multicultural metropolis.

The conference banquet will be held at the Colosseum Berlin, a former horse-drawn railway hall, later a cinema, and now an impressive complex that hosts events. This one-of-a-kind space seamlessly blends the charm of historic brickwork with a contemporary atmosphere.
items.abstract_zh:
我们非常高兴地欢迎您参加在德意志​​联邦共和国首都举行的 2025 年 ACM SIGMOD/PODS 国际数据管理会议。我们期待您在柏林这个位于欧洲中心的充满活力的大都市举办一场激动人心的会议。

With over 3.6 million inhabitants, Berlin thrives thanks in part to the diverse people from all over the world who have shaped the city.在德国的任何其他地方，您都找不到如此多的世界著名景点、商业活动、音乐会、博物馆、购物机会和丰富的美食。有趣的是，柏林被称为水城，拥有广阔的河流、湖泊和运河网络，以及众多的桥梁：远远超过威尼斯！

现代柏林不仅是领先的文化中心，也是领先的科学中心。在过去的几十年里，都市区已发展成为数据系统技术的国际据点。如今，主要的工业参与者包括亚马逊、Databricks、谷歌和 Snowflake。此外，还有多个领先的学术机构和研究组织，包括BIFOLD/柏林工业大学、DFKI（德国人工智能研究中心）、波茨坦大学哈索-普拉特纳研究所和柏林洪堡大学。此外，柏林拥有充满活力的创业氛围。

今年的 SIGMOD 将在柏林洲际酒店举行，这是一家国际知名的现代化酒店，以其棋盘式外观而与众不同，也是该地区最著名的酒店之一。柏林洲际酒店位于著名的蒂尔加滕，距离标志性的勃兰登堡门仅几步之遥，是开始探索这座多元文化大都市的绝佳起点。

会议宴会将在柏林斗兽场举行，这里以前是一个马拉铁路大厅，后来是一家电影院，现在是一个举办活动的令人印象深刻的综合体。这个独一无二的空间将历史砖砌的魅力与现代氛围完美地融合在一起。
